name: Grand Slam Golf Academy at Bobby Jones Golf Course
about: The Grand Slam Golf Academy is a golf training facility located within the B.J. and Jack Bandy Instructional Center at Bobby Jones Golf Course in Atlanta, Georgia. It is equipped with state-of-the-art technology including TrackMan and FlightScope launch monitors, as well as biomechanics feedback systems, to provide data-driven instruction. The academy offers private lessons, adult and junior programs, and group clinics, all led by PGA/LPGA instructors with specialized certifications. Pricing is structured per lesson or clinic, with options for gift cards.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art technology including TrackMan 4 and FlightScope X2 Elite launch monitors
Instant feedback from PGA/LPGA instructors to improve ball speed and carry distance
Comprehensive program offerings for adults, juniors, and various skill levels
Private lessons with online follow-up for personalized coaching

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service or kitchen on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing detailed ball flight data
Premium launch monitor for detailed shot analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: For clinics, club availability depends on the specific program. Beginner Women's Clinics provide clubs, while Women's Intermediate Clinics require participants to have their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a kitchen or food service on-site, and no specific policy on bringing outside food or drinks is stated.

faq.question: How long is a typical 18-hole simulator session?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify a standard duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Grand Slam Golf Academy offers numerous junior programs and camps and is staffed with U.S. Kids Golf Certified Coaches, making it a kid-friendly environment.
